revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Sikhism | title = [[Sikhism]] | listclass = hlist | basestyle = background:#FFC600 | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | abovestyle = font-weight:bold; | above = [[Glossary of Sikhism|Glossary]] and [[History of Sikhism|History]] | group1 = [[Sikh gurus|Gurus]] | list1 = *[[Guru Nanak]] *[[Guru Angad]] *[[Guru Amar Das]] *[[Guru Ram Das]] *[[Guru Arjan]] *[[Guru Hargobind]] *[[Guru Har Rai]] *[[Guru Har Krishan]] *[[Guru Tegh Bahadur]] *[[Guru Gobind Singh]] *[[Guru Granth Sahib]] (Sikh holy book) | group2 = [[Sikh philosophy|Philosophy]] | list2 = *[[Sikh philosophy|Beliefs and principles]] *[[Guru Maneyo Granth]] *[[Sikh Rehat Maryada]] *[[The 52 Hukams of Guru Gobind Singh|The 52 Hukams]] *[[Prohibitions in Sikhism|Prohibitions]] ** [[Cannabis and Sikhism]] *[[Diet in Sikhism]] | group3 = [[:Category:Sikh practices|Practices]] | list3 = *[[Khalsa]] *[[Sikh practices]] *[[Sikh rites]] *[[Ardās]] *[[Kirtan]] *[[Langar (Sikhism)|Langar]] *[[Naam Karan]] *[[Anand Karaj]] *[[Amrit Sanchar]] *[[Amrit Velā]] *[[Antam Sanskar]] *[[Three pillars of Sikhism|Three Pillars]] *[[Kirat Karo]] *[[Naam Japo]] *[[Vand Chhako]] *[[The Five Ks]] *[[Simran]] *[[Seva (Indian religions)|Sewa]] *[[Charhdi Kala]] *[[Dasvand]] *[[Jhatka]] | group4 = [[:Category:Sikh scripture|Scripture]] | list4 = *[[Guru Granth Sahib]] *[[Dasam Granth]] *[[Sarbloh Granth]] *[[Gurbani]] *[[Mul Mantar]] *[[Japji Sahib]] *[[Chaupai (Sikhism)|Chaupai]] *[[Jaap Sahib]] *[[Rehras]] *[[Sukhmani Sahib]] *[[Tav-Prasad Savaiye]] | group5 = [[Sikh architecture|Architecture]] | list5 = * [[Gurdwara]] ** [[Golden Temple|Harmandir Sahib]] ** [[Gurdwara Janam Asthan|Janam Asthan]] ** [[Gurdwara Darbar Sahib Kartarpur|Darbar Sahib Kartarpur]] ** [[List of gurdwaras|List]] *** [[List of gurdwaras#Africa|Africa]] *** [[List of gurdwaras#Asia|Asia]] *** [[List of gurdwaras#Europe|Europe]] *** [[List of gurdwaras#North America|North America]] * [[Bahadurgarh Fort]] * [[Fateh Burj]] * [[Hazuri Bagh Baradari]] * [[Kesgarh Qila]] * [[Khanda museum]] * [[Moti Bagh Palace]] * [[Nanak Shahi bricks]] * [[Pul Kanjri]] * [[Qila Mubarak, Patiala]] * [[Ramgarhia Bunga]] * [[Samadhi of Ranjit Singh]] * [[Well of Dina Nath]] | group6 = [[Sikhism by country|By country]] | list6 = *[[Sikh diaspora|Diaspora]] *[[Sikhism in Afghanistan|Afghanistan]] *[[Sikhism in Australia|Australia]] *[[Sikhism in Austria|Austria]] *[[Sikhism in Bangladesh|Bangladesh]] *[[Sikhism in Belgium|Belgium]] *[[Sikhism in Canada|Canada]] **[[Sikhism in Greater Vancouver|Vancouver]] *[[Sikhism in China|China]] *[[Sikhism in Denmark|Denmark]] *[[Sikhism in Fiji|Fiji]] *[[Sikhism in Finland|Finland]] *[[Sikhism in France|France]] *[[Sikhism in Germany|Germany]] *[[Sikhism in Greece|Greece]] *[[Sikhism in India|India]] **[[Sikhism in Jammu and Kashmir|Jammu and Kashmir]] **[[Cochin Sikhs|Kochi]] **[[Demographics of Punjab, India#Sikhism in Punjab|Punjab]] *[[Sikhism in Indonesia|Indonesia]] *[[Sikhism in Iran|Iran]] *[[Sikhism in Iraq|Iraq]] *[[Sikhism in Italy|Italy]] *[[Sikhism in Japan|Japan]] *[[Sikhism in Malaysia|Malaysia]] *[[Sikhism in Nepal|Nepal]] *[[Sikhism in the Netherlands|Netherlands]] *[[Sikhism in New Zealand|New Zealand]] *[[Sikhism in Niue|Niue]] *[[Sikhism in Norway|Norway]] *[[Sikhism in Pakistan|Pakistan]] *[[Sikhism in Panama|Panama]] *[[Sikhism in Poland|Poland]] *[[Sikhism in Singapore|Singapore]] *[[Sikhism in South Africa|South Africa]] *[[Sikhism in South Korea|South Korea]] *[[Sikhism in Sweden|Sweden]] *[[Sikhism in Switzerland|Switzerland]] *[[Sikhism in Thailand|Thailand]] *[[Sikhism in the United Arab Emirates|United Arab Emirates]] *[[Sikhism in the United Kingdom|United Kingdom]] **[[Sikhism in England|England]] **[[Sikhism in Scotland|Scotland]] **[[Sikhism in Wales|Wales]] **[[Sikhism in Northern Ireland|Northern Ireland]] *[[Sikhism in the United States|United States]] **[[Sikhs in the United States military|U.S. Military]] | group7 = [[Sikh|Groups, sects
and communities]] | list7 = *[[Sects of Sikhism]] **[[Khalsa]] **[[Mina (Sikhism)|Mina]] **[[Namdhari]] **[[Nanakpanthi]] **[[Nihang]] **[[Nirankari]] **[[Sewapanthi]] **[[Nirmala (sect)|Nirmala]] **[[Ramraiya]] **[[Udasi]] *[[Mazhabi Sikh]] **[[Piara Singh Bhaniara]] *[[Agrahari Sikh]] *[[Jatha]] **[[Damdami Taksal]] **[[Akhand Kirtani Jatha]] *[[Singh Sabha]] *[[Contemporary Sant Mat movements]] **[[3HO]] | group8 = [[Sikh Empire]] | list8 = {{Sikh Empire}} | group9 = [[Sikh festivals|Festivals]] | list9 = *[[Bandi Chhor Divas]] *[[Hola Mohalla]] *[[Maghi]] **[[Mela Maghi]] *[[Vaisakhi]] | group10 = [[:Category:Sikhism|Other topics]] | list10 = *[[History of Sikhism|History]] *[[Sikh culture|Culture]] *[[Sikh art|Art]] *[[Sikh music|Music]] *[[Ik Onkar]] *[[Waheguru]] *[[Khanda (Sikh symbol)|Khanda]] *[[Panj Pyare]] *[[:Category:Films about Sikhism|Films]] *[[:Category:Sikh literature|Literature]] *[[:Category:Sikh music|Music]] *[[Sikh names|Names]] *[[:Category:Sikh places|Places]] *[[:Category:Sikh politics|Politics]] *[[Sikhs in the British Indian Army]] **[[11th Sikh Regiment]] *[[Sikh Regiment]] *[[Sikh Light Infantry]] *[[Nanakshahi calendar]] *[[Ramananda]] *[[Fariduddin Ganjshakar]] *[[Kabir]] *[[Sardar]] *[[Dastar]] *[[Dharamyudh (Sikhism)|Dharamyudh]] *[[Islam and Sikhism|Islam]] *[[Jainism and Sikhism|Jainism]] *[[Hinduism and Sikhism|Hinduism]] ** [[Rama in Sikhism|Rama]] *[[:Category:Sikhs|Sikhs]] *[[Ravidassia]] *[[Women in Sikhism]] *[[Sikhism and sexual orientation]] *[[:Category:Fiction about Sikhism|In Fiction]] *[[Idolatry in Sikhism]] *[[Criticism of Sikhism|Criticism]] *[[Punjab]] **[[History of the Punjab|History]] **[[Punjabis]] **[[Punjabi language]] ([[Gurmukhi script|Gurmukhī]]) *[[Sacred trees in Sikhism|Sacred trees]] | group11 = [[Panj Takht|Takht]] | list11 = *[[Akal Takht]] *[[Takht Sri Damdama Sahib|Damdama Sahib]] *[[Takht Kesgarh Sahib|Kesgarh Sahib]] *[[Hazur Sahib Nanded|Hazur Sahib]] *[[Takht Sri Patna Sahib|Patna Sahib]] | belowstyle = font-weight:bold; | below = {{icon|Outline}} [[Outline of Sikhism|Outline]] {{icon|Category}} [[:Category:Sikhism|Category]] }} {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Sikhism templates]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Sikhism | title = [[Sikhism]] | listclass = hlist | basestyle = background:#FFC600 | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | abovestyle = font-weight:bold; | above = [[Glossary of Sikhism|Glossary]] and [[History of Sikhism|History]] | group1 = [[Sikh gurus|Gurus]] | list1 = *[[Guru Nanak]] *[[Guru Angad]] *[[Guru Amar Das]] *[[Guru Ram Das]] *[[Guru Arjan]] *[[Guru Hargobind]] *[[Guru Har Rai]] *[[Guru Har Krishan]] *[[Guru Tegh Bahadur]] *[[Guru Gobind Singh]] *[[Guru Granth Sahib]] (Sikh holy book) | group2 = [[Sikh philosophy|Philosophy]] | list2 = *[[Sikh philosophy|Beliefs and principles]] *[[Guru Maneyo Granth]] *[[Sikh Rehat Maryada]] *[[The 52 Hukams of Guru Gobind Singh|The 52 Hukams]] *[[Prohibitions in Sikhism|Prohibitions]] ** [[Cannabis and Sikhism]] *[[Diet in Sikhism]] | group3 = [[:Category:Sikh practices|Practices]] | list3 = *[[Khalsa]] *[[Sikh practices]] *[[Sikh rites]] *[[Ardās]] *[[Kirtan]] *[[Langar (Sikhism)|Langar]] *[[Naam Karan]] *[[Anand Karaj]] *[[Amrit Sanchar]] *[[Amrit Velā]] *[[Antam Sanskar]] *[[Three pillars of Sikhism|Three Pillars]] *[[Kirat Karo]] *[[Naam Japo]] *[[Vand Chhako]] *[[The Five Ks]] *[[Simran]] *[[Seva (Indian religions)|Sewa]] *[[Charhdi Kala]] *[[Dasvand]] *[[Jhatka]] | group4 = [[:Category:Sikh scripture|Scripture]] | list4 = *[[Guru Granth Sahib]] *[[Dasam Granth]] *[[Sarbloh Granth]] *[[Gurbani]] *[[Mul Mantar]] *[[Japji Sahib]] *[[Chaupai (Sikhism)|Chaupai]] *[[Jaap Sahib]] *[[Rehras]] *[[Sukhmani Sahib]] *[[Tav-Prasad Savaiye]] | group5 = [[Sikh architecture|Architecture]] | list5 = * [[Gurdwara]] ** [[Golden Temple|Harmandir Sahib]] ** [[Gurdwara Janam Asthan|Janam Asthan]] ** [[Gurdwara Darbar Sahib Kartarpur|Darbar Sahib Kartarpur]] ** [[List of gurdwaras|List]] *** [[List of gurdwaras#Africa|Africa]] *** [[List of gurdwaras#Asia|Asia]] *** [[List of gurdwaras#Europe|Europe]] *** [[List of gurdwaras#North America|North America]] * [[Bahadurgarh Fort]] * [[Fateh Burj]] * [[Hazuri Bagh Baradari]] * [[Kesgarh Qila]] * [[Khanda museum]] * [[Moti Bagh Palace]] * [[Nanak Shahi bricks]] * [[Pul Kanjri]] * [[Qila Mubarak, Patiala]] * [[Ramgarhia Bunga]] * [[Samadhi of Ranjit Singh]] * [[Well of Dina Nath]] | group6 = [[Sikhism by country|By country]] | list6 = *[[Sikh diaspora|Diaspora]] *[[Sikhism in Afghanistan|Afghanistan]] *[[Sikhism in Australia|Australia]] *[[Sikhism in Austria|Austria]] *[[Sikhism in Bangladesh|Bangladesh]] *[[Sikhism in Belgium|Belgium]] *[[Sikhism in Canada|Canada]] **[[Sikhism in Greater Vancouver|Vancouver]] *[[Sikhism in China|China]] *[[Sikhism in Denmark|Denmark]] *[[Sikhism in Fiji|Fiji]] *[[Sikhism in Finland|Finland]] *[[Sikhism in France|France]] *[[Sikhism in Germany|Germany]] *[[Sikhism in Greece|Greece]] *[[Sikhism in India|India]] **[[Sikhism in Jammu and Kashmir|Jammu and Kashmir]] **[[Cochin Sikhs|Kochi]] **[[Demographics of Punjab, India#Sikhism in Punjab|Punjab]] *[[Sikhism in Indonesia|Indonesia]] *[[Sikhism in Iran|Iran]] *[[Sikhism in Iraq|Iraq]] *[[Sikhism in Italy|Italy]] *[[Sikhism in Japan|Japan]] *[[Sikhism in Malaysia|Malaysia]] *[[Sikhism in Nepal|Nepal]] *[[Sikhism in the Netherlands|Netherlands]] *[[Sikhism in New Zealand|New Zealand]] *[[Sikhism in Niue|Niue]] *[[Sikhism in Norway|Norway]] *[[Sikhism in Pakistan|Pakistan]] *[[Sikhism in Panama|Panama]] *[[Sikhism in Poland|Poland]] *[[Sikhism in Singapore|Singapore]] *[[Sikhism in South Africa|South Africa]] *[[Sikhism in South Korea|South Korea]] *[[Sikhism in Sweden|Sweden]] *[[Sikhism in Switzerland|Switzerland]] *[[Sikhism in Thailand|Thailand]] *[[Sikhism in the United Arab Emirates|United Arab Emirates]] *[[Sikhism in the United Kingdom|United Kingdom]] **[[Sikhism in England|England]] **[[Sikhism in Scotland|Scotland]] **[[Sikhism in Wales|Wales]] **[[Sikhism in Northern Ireland|Northern Ireland]] *[[Sikhism in the United States|United States]] **[[Sikhs in the United States military|U.S. Military]] | group7 = [[Sikh|Groups, sects
and communities]] | list7 = *[[Sects of Sikhism]] **[[Khalsa]] **[[Mina (Sikhism)|Mina]] **[[Namdhari]] **[[Nanakpanthi]] **[[Nihang]] **[[Nirankari]] **[[Sewapanthi]] **[[Nirmala (sect)|Nirmala]] **[[Ramraiya]] **[[Udasi]] *[[Mazhabi Sikh]] **[[Piara Singh Bhaniara]] *[[Agrahari Sikh]] *[[Jatha]] **[[Damdami Taksal]] **[[Akhand Kirtani Jatha]] *[[Singh Sabha]] *[[Contemporary Sant Mat movements]] **[[3HO]] | group8 = [[Sikh Empire]] | list8 = {{Sikh Empire}} | group9 = [[Sikh festivals|Festivals]] | list9 = *[[Bandi Chhor Divas]] *[[Hola Mohalla]] *[[Maghi]] **[[Mela Maghi]] *[[Vaisakhi]] | group10 = [[:Category:Sikhism|Other topics]] | list10 = *[[History of Sikhism|History]] *[[Sikh culture|Culture]] *[[Sikh art|Art]] *[[Sikh music|Music]] *[[Ik Onkar]] *[[Waheguru]] *[[Khanda (Sikh symbol)|Khanda]] *[[Panj Pyare]] *[[:Category:Films about Sikhism|Films]] *[[:Category:Sikh literature|Literature]] *[[:Category:Sikh music|Music]] *[[Sikh names|Names]] *[[:Category:Sikh places|Places]] *[[:Category:Sikh politics|Politics]] *[[Sikhs in the British Indian Army]] **[[11th Sikh Regiment]] *[[Sikh Regiment]] *[[Sikh Light Infantry]] *[[Nanakshahi calendar]] *[[Ramananda]] *[[Fariduddin Ganjshakar]] *[[Kabir]] *[[Sardar]] *[[Dastar]] *[[Dharamyudh (Sikhism)|Dharamyudh]] *[[Islam and Sikhism|Islam]] *[[Jainism and Sikhism|Jainism]] *[[Hinduism and Sikhism|Hinduism]] ** [[Rama in Sikhism|Rama]] *[[:Category:Sikhs|Sikhs]] *[[Ravidassia]] *[[Women in Sikhism]] *[[Sikhism and sexual orientation]] *[[:Category:Fiction about Sikhism|In Fiction]] *[[Idolatry in Sikhism]] *[[Criticism of Sikhism|Criticism]] *[[Punjab]] **[[History of the Punjab|History]] **[[Punjabis]] **[[Punjabi language]] ([[Gurmukhi script|Gurmukhī]]) *[[Sacred trees in Sikhism|Sacred trees]] | group11 = [[Panj Takht|Takht]] | list11 = *[[Akal Takht]] *[[Takht Sri Damdama Sahib|Damdama Sahib]] *[[Takht Kesgarh Sahib|Kesgarh Sahib]] *[[Hazur Sahib Nanded|Hazur Sahib]] option}} [[Category:Sikhism templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606305292|commit triggered pipeline]]
